query:
INSERT INTO restaurants (slug, name, nameEn, nameEs, cuisineType, tagline, address, themeColor, accentColor, active)
VALUES
  ('organic', 'Organic In The Box', 'Organic In The Box', 'Organic In The Box', 'Healthy Café', '100% Healthy · Coffee · Brunch · Beer', 'Rua do Retiro, Jundiaí - SP', '#1a2e1a', '#4ade80', true),
  ('topdog', 'Top Dog Brasil', 'Top Dog Brasil', 'Top Dog Brasil', 'Cachorreria Prensada', 'O simples bem feito · Hot Dogs Prensados', 'Rua do Retiro, 1276 · Jundiaí - SP', '#1a0505', '#ef4444', true),
  ('laguapa', 'La Guapa', 'La Guapa', 'La Guapa', 'Argentina · Artesanal', 'Empanadas Artesanais · Café · Bistrô', 'Rua do Retiro, 848 · Jundiaí - SP', '#1a1505', '#f59e0b', true),
  ('elpatron', 'El Patron', 'El Patron', 'El Patron', 'Comida Mexicana', 'Mexican Food · The Taste is Right Here', 'Rua do Retiro, 1222 · Jundiaí - SP', '#1a0a05', '#f97316', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
